blended.narrative: Shawnee Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 46°F.
Wednesday: light freezing rain, highs of 43°F.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
